sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ هِنْدٌ أَكْلَ الْحُمُّصِ فِي الْفُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Hind voli jesti humus za doručak.
sentences.translationEn: Hind likes eating hummus for breakfast.

sentences.arabic: تَضَعُ عَلَيْهِ زَيْتَ الزَّيْتُونِ وَقَلِيلًا مِنَ الْفَلْفَلِ.
sentences.translation: Stavlja maslinovo ulje i malo paprike na njega.
sentences.translationEn: She puts olive oil and a little pepper on it.

sentences.arabic: تَأْكُلُهُ مَعَ الْخُبْزِ الطَّازِجِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Jede ga sa svježim hljebom svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: She eats it with fresh bread every morning.

sentences.translation: Kaže: Humus mi daje energiju za dan.
sentences.translationEn: She says: Hummus gives me energy for the day.
